Staff Through Plate.name: Staff Through Plate
Staff Through Plate.description: The senior brothers' working. The staff strike at full intent, magical and physical aligned, that drives wood through worn plate and the wearer behind it. Used at the close of a fight against an armored opponent, when the brother is committed and there will not be a second swing. Spends a heavy share of mana.

Pair-Bonded.name: Pair-Bonded
Pair-Bonded.description: Brotherhood pair-discipline. The brother and his agoge-comrade have worked together for decades; in combat they coordinate without speech, the strikes interleave, the bracing covers each other's openings. Bonus while fighting alongside the bonded brother. The order does not enforce these bonds; it does not police them either.

Reservoir Spend.name: Reservoir Spend
Reservoir Spend.description: The College's signature — the working a trained witch builds toward when the moment justifies it. Empty most of the reservoir into a single act the world will remember: a wall of cold across a battlefield, a flame that swallows a war-band, a glamour that holds a city's eyes for an hour, a healing that brings someone back from the edge. The witch is spent afterward and will be a woman in unusual clothes hoping nobody notices until she fills again.

Cooperative Filling.name: Cooperative Filling
Cooperative Filling.description: The cooperative practice the Brotherhood was built to refuse. With a willing male partner who carries his own mana, the witch fills her reservoir directly through ingestion of his essence or being ejaculated into. A long downtime scene played out as intimacy; mechanically a meaningful refill of reservoir from the partner's mana, more than any potion can match. Avenor-legal and dignified through the Queen's College consort-line system. Doctrinally illegal everywhere else; a witch and a partner caught at it in a human kingdom outside Avenor face arrest and quiet disposal.

Co-Working.name: Co-Working
Co-Working.description: The cooperative practice in action — a witch and a willing wizard partner pool their pools on a single working. The witch acts; the wizard's mana flows alongside her reservoir into the spell. Workings at the upper edge of either's solo reach become routine; workings beyond either's solo reach become possible. The doctrinal Avenorian war-mode.
